name: openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG Repository List

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Compatibility Winapp sig group is mainly dedicated to introducing massive Windows applications for X86 platform into openeuler system with X86/arm architecture.. The SIG has 11 core members and maintains 26 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at compat-winapp@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG maintains 26 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-compat-winapp.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-compat-winapp SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Liang Keming, Liu Buquan, Mu Ruichao. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
